scope_note: Cert [474]: QA Witt Tower Cross-Asset Transfer. Claim: a<=6 and crash pair signals transfer to equity-proximate assets; gold and crude are structural nulls. VNQ: a6 +0.591% p=0.0, cp +2.954% p=0.0. TLT: a6 +0.205% p=0.01. DBA: cp +0.671% p=0.003. GLD: cp p=0.496 (confirmed null). Asset-class-specific transfer: crash-bounce dynamics in equity-correlated assets (REIT, agri), absent in pure stores of value (gold, mid-term bonds). PRIMARY SOURCES: Fama EF (1970) doi:10.2307/2325486; Erb CB, Harvey CR (2006) doi:10.2469/faj.v62.n2.4083. Parents: cert [461],[463],[473]. Validated 2026-06-19.
